nodes.title: Validate Login Credentials
nodes.description: POST /api/auth/login with {username, password}. Compares password with bcrypt. Returns {token, user: {id, username, fullName, role}} on success. Returns 401 with {error: 'اسم المستخدم أو كلمة المرور غير صحيحة'} on invalid credentials. Returns 403 with {error: 'الحساب معطل'} if user is inactive. Returns 400 if username or password missing.

nodes.title: Hash Password On Register
nodes.description: When processing POST /api/auth/register, hash plaintext password using bcrypt with 10 salt rounds. Input: password string from body. Output: hashed string stored in users table. Never return hashed password in response.

nodes.title: Check Username Uniqueness
nodes.description: On register, check users table for existing username. If exists return 400 with {error: 'اسم المستخدم مستخدم بالفعل'}. If not exists proceed to create user record.

nodes.title: Create User Record
nodes.description: POST /api/auth/register with {username, password, fullName, role}. Inserts row into users table with hashed password. Returns 201 with {user: {id, username, fullName, role}} on success. Role defaults to 'viewer' if omitted.

nodes.title: Return JWT On Login
nodes.description: After validating credentials, generate JWT with payload {userId, username, role}. Return {token, user} in response. Token is used in Authorization header for protected routes.
